title: Creatiopia
description: A simple modpack made to enhance both create and Yung's mods!
body:
# **Welcome to Creatiopia!**

Creatiopia is a modpack for Fabric 1.20.1 that is meant for exploration and technology! It contains Create and Yung's mods with Terralith and Tectonic for terrain generation.

It contains Sodium.
It has Iris with Rethinking Voxels set to Unbound instead of Reimagined and is on the default High Settings.

## Create
### It contains create with many addons to make excavating the terrain and building an empire with massive factories!

## Yung
### It contains many of Yung's mods to enhance exploration! It overhauls most of the vanilla structures to make it more fun!

## Terrain Generation
### It contains Terralith and Tectonic for overhauled terrain generation.
